tasks.noticing_probe_answer: The task wording "Update how Review's name is stored" was slightly misleading: the Review entity had no `name` field at all (it had `id`, `content`, `rating`). So this was an addition rather than an update to existing storage. The rest of the provided spec/context files were accurate.
tasks.nl_request: Update how Review's name is stored so it accepts the values the business now needs.
